description: The agent provides a detailed and itemized cost breakdown (flights, hotels, activities) that sums to a total within or below the user’s stated budget, with no hidden or unexplained costs.

When the preferred destination exceeds the budget, the agent suggests at least one viable and demonstrably less expensive alternative destination with corresponding cost details that are realistic and accessible.
All dates are formatted clearly and consistently according to the user’s locale conventions, avoiding ambiguity.
All itinerary times (flights, activities) reflect accurate and consistent time zone conversions across components to avoid confusion.
The output is internally consistent and coherent, with no contradictory or conflicting information across itinerary components.
Suggested alternatives and itinerary components are practically feasible, respecting travel constraints such as flight availability and realistic booking options.
Other important quality factors not covered by listed criteria.
